title: selaginella chevalieri
intro: Selaginella chevalieri, also known as the Spiny Spike Moss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial, and homosporous plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties. The medicinal properties of Selaginella chevalieri are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and triterpenoids, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, providing potential health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Selaginella chevalieri is often combined with other medicinal plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
